item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Sage's Journey I-IV
item.description:
A compilation of the first four volumes of the detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned sage─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level sage to 90 and complete all job quests and healer role quests up through “The Gift of Mercy.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
